alkylation reagent: iodoacetamide was added to a final concentration of 10 mM.
alkylation concentration: iodoacetamide was added to a final concentration of 10 mM.
cleavage agent: The samples were digested with trypsin (Promega) at a ratio of 1:100.
collision energy: Precursor ions were fragmented by high-energy dissociation in a C-trap with a normalized collision energy of 28 eV.
enrichment method: To enrich for phosphorylated peptides, we applied the High-Select TiO2 Phosphopeptide Enrichment Kit.
fragmentation method: Precursor ions were fragmented by high-energy dissociation in a C-trap with a normalized collision energy of 28 eV.
instrument: Samples were analyzed using a Q Exactive HF mass spectrometer.
labeling: using the stable isotope labelling by amino acids in cell culture (SILAC) LC-MS/MS approach.
reduction reagent: Disulfide bonds were reduced with 5 mM DTT for 30 min at room temperature.
reduction concentration: Disulfide bonds were reduced with 5 mM DTT for 30 min at room temperature.
